title: 4/20〜4/24 Weekly Market Report
summary: 52/67 themes (78%) advanced (+2.87% avg). Defense & Aerospace +9.4%, Cybersecurity +8.1%. Policy-driven acceleration.
report:
## Market Overview (Week of Apr 20–24, 2026)

52 of 67 themes (78%) advanced, average return +2.87%. One of the strongest broad-market weeks of 2026.

---

## Rising Themes

### 🥇 #1: Defense & Aerospace (+9.4%)
Major procurement contract awards announced. MHI (7011) surged 12%.

### 🥈 #2: Cybersecurity (+8.1%)
Active Cyber Defense legislation passed first reading. Mandatory security spending for critical infrastructure operators to increase dramatically.

### 🥉 #3: Edge AI (+7.6%)
Nvidia announced edge AI chips optimized for Japanese manufacturing. Sensor and embedded systems stocks surged.

### #4: Telecom (+6.9%) / #5: Construction & Infra (+5.8%)
NTT confirmed IOWN commercialization timeline; infrastructure companies benefited from national resilience spending.

---

## Falling Themes

Oil & Gas (-2.3%) declined on Middle East de-escalation signals.

---

## StockWaveJP Commentary

Defense and Cybersecurity both shifted to 'Accelerating' simultaneously for the first time in 2026 — a strong signal of a policy-driven rather than speculative catalyst. We view this as a multi-week rotation into domestic security themes.
